violations.text: The 3-bay sink was observed in improper adjustment (faucet not reaching all 3-bays). A plumbing system shall be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Pre-packaged baked pizza/desserts in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The faucet at the 3-bay sink was observed in improper (faucet not reaching all 3 bays). A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

Raw animal foods (Eggs) were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (stored above packaged cheeses in the 2 door reach-in cooler). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. (Eggs moved to bottom shelf at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach/chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
